name: inno-code
description: Inno Code desktop MVP with multi-agent debate orchestration built on openclaude-compatible engine abstractions.

scripts.build: npm run -w @inno/engine build && npm run -w @inno/desktop build
scripts.test: npm run -w @inno/engine test && npm run -w @inno/desktop test
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @inno/engine typecheck && npm run -w @inno/desktop typecheck
